label: Explain
description: Explain selected code, behavior, and reasoning in concise terms.
template: /explain Review this code path and explain what it does, risks, and edge cases.

label: Unit Test
description: Generate focused tests for the active function/module.
template: /unit-test Create unit tests for the changed logic and include edge cases.

label: Summarize
description: Summarize a thread, change set, or long output.
template: /summarize Summarize the current thread into decisions, risks, and next actions.

label: Refactor
description: Request a scoped refactor plan and implementation steps.
template: /refactor Refactor this module for readability and maintainability without behavior changes.
